title: Trivikrama Temple
tagline: Trivikrama Temple — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: The Trivikrama Temple, also named Ter Temple, is a temple of Vamana (an incarnation of Vishnu) in Ter, Maharashtra.
overview.description: The Trivikrama Temple, also named Ter Temple, is a temple of Vamana (an incarnation of Vishnu) in Ter, Maharashtra. Henry Cousens, followed by most later writers, believed that it was originally a Buddhist temple, however in 1957 M. S. Mate disputed this view. The temple is original in that it was initially based on a free-standing apsidal structure, now located at the back of the building, which is characteristic of early Buddhist apsidal caityagriha designs. The apsidal structure seems to be contemporary to the great apsidal temple found in Sirkap, Taxila, which is dated to 30 BCE-50 CE. It

topPlaces.name: Ter, Maharashtra
topPlaces.description: Ter is a village in Osmanabad district of Maharashtra state, India. It is 17 kilometres (11 mi) from the district headquarters, Osmanabad, 50 kilometres (31 mi) from Latur.

topPlaces.name: Terna Dam
topPlaces.description: Terna Dam is an earthfill dam on Terna river near Osmanabad in the state of Maharashtra in India.

topPlaces.name: Osmanabad
topPlaces.description: Osmanabad, officially known as Dharashiv, is a city and a municipal council in Osmanabad district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is the seventh largest city in Marathwada, and the 39th largest city in Maharashtra by population.

items.note: Ter is a village in Osmanabad district of Maharashtra state, India. It is 17 kilometres (11 mi) from the district headquarters, Osmanabad, 50 kilometres (31 mi) from Latur.
Terna Dam is an earthfill dam on Terna river near Osmanabad in the state of Maharashtra in India.

Osmanabad, officially known as Dharashiv, is a city and a municipal council in Osmanabad district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is the seventh largest city in Marathwada, and the 39th largest city in Maharashtra by population.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Trivikrama Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Trivikrama Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Trivikrama Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Nanded Airport (157 km) and the nearest railway station is Solapur Junction (76 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Trivikrama Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Trivikrama Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Trivikrama Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Trivikrama Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Trivikrama Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ter, Maharashtra, Terna Dam, Osmanabad.
